candidates.why: Explicit top-line revenue figure; matches definition of total revenue/sales and has large positive values across years.
Rental income is other operating income, not total revenue; should not be used as REVT.
This is a profit subtotal, not revenue.
This is post-tax discontinued result, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income attributable to Hydro shareholders
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not revenue.
Comprehensive income total, not revenue.
Finance income, not operating revenue.
Interest income is financial, not operating revenue.
Core direct production cost line; best proxy for cost of goods sold/cost of sales.
Related to materials but appears as an alternative/adjustment; less clearly the primary COGS line than raw material and energy expense.

candidates.row_label: Raw material and energy expense - others
candidates.why: Supplementary detail to raw material and energy expense; not the main total.
Includes all staff costs, not limited to direct production; mixes COGS and SG&A so not ideal as COGS.
Broad operating overhead bucket; more SG&A-like than COGS.
Net operating income/expense, not pure COGS.
Specific overhead item, not main COGS.
Non-operating; not COGS.
Financing cost, not COGS.
Non-core items, not COGS.
Financing result, not COGS.
High-level net line, mixes income and expenses; not pure COGS.
Non-recurring; should not define recurring COGS.

candidates.row_label: Unrealized derivative effects on power and raw material contracts
candidates.why: Valuation effects, not core COGS.
Inventory balance-sheet item, not an expense flow.
Prepaid asset, not COGS.
Long-term prepaid asset, not COGS.
Liability, not cost of sales.
Label indicates income, not overhead expense; unsuitable as SG&A cost component.
Net operating line mixing income and expenses, including items outside SG&A; not a clean SG&A component.
Generic mixed income/expense line; not clearly SG&A-only and likely overlaps with other components.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. The provided XSGA candidates are mixed income/expense buckets, not pure overhead expenses. SG&A-type costs are more clearly represented by 'Employee benefit expense' and 'Other expenses', which together capture personnel and other operating overhead. 'Auditor Fees - Total' is a small but clearly SG&A-type item. There is no explicit single 'Selling, General & Administrative' line, so these components are chosen as the best approximation and should be manually reviewed. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Employee benefit expense, [Income Statement] Other expenses, [Income Statement] Auditor Fees - Total

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line with recurring values; best direct match for R&D expense.
Capitalized R&D, not current-period expense; should not be used for XRD.
Generic R&D label but appears unused/empty; secondary to the explicit 'Research & Development' line.
Asset, not current R&D expense.
Appears to be an aggregate/capitalization-related total; less clear than pure expense line.
Aggregated finance expense line; good backup for total interest cost when detailed lines are missing.

candidates.row_label: Net income (loss) attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Earnings allocation, not interest expense.
Same as above, not interest.
Interest income, opposite sign of interest expense; not suitable as XINT.
Generic interest expense line; good candidate but appears with no preview values (still may contain data historically).

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest portion of lease liabilities; component of total interest expense.
Non-lease interest expense; key component of total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best representation of total interest cost recognized in P&L after capitalization; ideal primary XINT line.
Interest capitalized to assets, not expensed; should not be primary XINT but relevant for reconciliation.
Interest component related to pension liability; part of finance costs but narrower in scope than main interest expense lines.
Duplicate concept to 'Capitalized Interest'; again, not expensed interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental detail of lease interest; secondary to main expense line.

candidates.row_label: Bank loans and other interest-bearing short-term debt
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability, not expense flow.
Balance sheet liability, not expense.
Equity, not interest expense.
Equity, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Ordered to prioritize the cleanest P&L interest expense measure (net of capitalized interest), then its components and finally the aggregate finance expense line as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Share of the profit (loss) in equity acc
candidates.why: Income from equity-accounted investments, not equity itself.

candidates.row_label: Share of the profit (loss) in equity accounted investments
candidates.why: Same as above; P&L item, not balance-sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: OCI - Share of remeasurement postemployement benefits of equity accounted investments, net of tax
candidates.why: OCI component, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: OCI - Share of items that will be reclassified to income statement of equity accounted investments, net of tax
candidates.why: OCI component, not equity total.
Income statement item (share of profit), not equity level.
Same as above.

candidates.row_label: Impairment charges (PP&E and equity accounted invest)
candidates.why: Impairment expense, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Investments accounted for using the equity method
candidates.why: Non-current asset investment, not shareholders' equity.
Component of equity but not total or parent-attributable equity.
Explicit parent/owner equity line, excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE per instructions.
Includes non-controlling interests; only fallback if parent-only equity were missing.

candidates.row_label: Net income (loss) attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Income allocation to NCI, not the balance sheet amount, but confirms presence of minorities.
Same income allocation line as above; not the balance-sheet interest itself.
Balance sheet line item for minority equity; best choice for MIB.
Duplicate labeling for non-controlling interests; secondary candidate.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not the stock of minority interest.
